blocks.body: Past Perfect Passive is used to describe actions that completed before another past action or before a specific moment in the past. Formula: had + been + V3.

{ "title": "10. Short summary", "items": [ "Past Perfect Passive: had + been + V3.", "Had is the same for all persons.", "been is an invariant part, always before V3.", "Objection: had + not + been + V3 (abbreviated: hadn't).", "Question: Had + Subject + been + V3?", "Used for: actions that preceded another past.", "Time markers: before, by the time, already, just, ever, never.", "Emphasizes the sequence of past events." ] }
